title: IE10 problems
author: sergeisnitko

comments.author: longwangsam
comments.body: I also have this question. How do you solve it？

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body: We do not target or support IE10 anymore. However, exceljs v4 is known to work with IE11, so maybe there's been changes that make it work. Feel free to try that out and report back any findings.

comments.author: longwangsam
comments.body:
> We do not target or support IE10 anymore. However, exceljs v4 is known to work with IE11, so maybe there's been changes that make it work. Feel free to try that out and report back any findings.

I try to use other components to solve this problem，Thank you
